parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1024, system: $json.orderPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ restaurant_id: $json.restaurantId, session_id: $json.sessionId, channel: $json.channel, items: $json.existingOrder, total: $json.existingOrder.reduce((s, i) => s + (i.price * (i.quantity || 1)), 0) }) }}
